com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl

Class TEMessageRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.AbstractTERequest
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEMessageRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITERequest

    public class TEMessageRequest
extends AbstractTERequest
    A message request is used to print a message triggered by an SUT action on the management side or when using the TTlibrary functions messageBox and timedMessageBox. Expects a TEResponse.OK as response.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITERequest
